name: Unlock All Special Clothes Sets
author: :P
description: 解锁 Forest Shop 全部特殊服装套装，无需满足原始解锁条件（季节/剧情/feat/好感度等）

js._comment1: Unlock all special clothes sets unconditionally - v1.0 2026-07-06 :P
js.to:
// MOD: Unlock all special clothes sets unconditionally
	V.specialClothes.forEach(clothing => { clothing.unlocked = 3; });
